evaluation_approach: ISO/IEC 25010:2023 adapted per Ardito et al. 2024
evaluator: Research team (same instrumentation infrastructure as QALIS)
limitations_observed: SF dimension: 24 hallucination events undetected — no NLI-based metrics available
TI dimension: 22 transparency deficiencies undetected — explainability not operationalized
RO dimension: 17 robustness failures undetected — perturbation testing not covered
Threshold values required manual expert calibration for each metric — no LLM-specific guidance in standard
SS-1 (toxicity) and SS-3 (injection) have no ISO counterparts — safety dimension partially blind
